mapper.select: select count(*) from post where post_status = 0 and category_idx = #{category_idx}
select count(*) from post where post_status = 0 and category_idx = 2 and member_idx=#{member_idx}

select count(*) from post p LEFT JOIN member m ON p.member_idx = m.member_idx
p.post_title LIKE CONCAT ('%', #{searchValue}, '%')
p.post_content LIKE CONCAT('%', #{searchValue}, '%')
m.member_nickname LIKE CONCAT('%', #{searchValue}, '%')
(p.post_title LIKE CONCAT('%', #{searchValue}, '%') OR p.post_content LIKE CONCAT('%', #{searchValue}, '%'))
and p.post_status = 0 and p.category_idx = 2

select count(*) from post p
p.post_title LIKE CONCAT ('%', #{searchValue}, '%')
p.post_content LIKE CONCAT('%', #{searchValue}, '%')
and p.post_status = 0 and p.category_idx = 2 and p.member_idx=#{member_idx}
mapper.insert: insert into post( member_idx, category_idx, post_title, post_content, post_created_at, post_updated_at) values ( #{member_idx}, #{category_idx}, #{post_title}, #{post_content}, now(), now())
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM post p inner join file f WHERE p.post_idx = #{post_idx} and post_status=0 group by p.post_idx

SELECT a.* FROM ( SELECT ROW_NUMBER() OVER(ORDER BY post_idx DESC) AS rnum, p.*, m.member_nickname FROM post p LEFT JOIN member m ON p.member_idx = m.member_idx
p.post_title LIKE CONCAT ('%', #{searchValue}, '%')
p.post_content LIKE CONCAT('%', #{searchValue}, '%')
m.member_nickname LIKE CONCAT('%', #{searchValue}, '%')
(p.post_title LIKE CONCAT('%', #{searchValue}, '%') OR p.post_content LIKE CONCAT('%', #{searchValue}, '%'))
and p.post_status = 0 and p.category_idx=2
)a where a.rnum BETWEEN #{begin} AND #{end};
mapper.insert: insert into comment( post_idx, member_idx, comment_content, comment_created_at, comment_updated_at, comment_status) values ( #{post_idx}, #{member_idx}, #{comment_content}, now(), now(), 0)
mapper.select: SELECT c.comment_idx, c.comment_content, c.comment_created_at, c.comment_updated_at, c.member_idx, m.member_nickname FROM comment c JOIN member m ON c.member_idx = m.member_idx WHERE c.post_idx = #{post_idx} ORDER BY c.comment_created_at ASC
